title: Due  11/5 @ 5 pm: Review /Correction of Exam 2
description:
Review Exam 2 which was returned in class.

For each incorrect multiple choice answer, write-up/explain why it was wrong and why the correct answer is right.

Just entering the correct answer is not acceptable.

Need to calculate a BOOM factor.  At top of explanation page being submitted, please provide a tally of how many times you went BOOM when reviewing the incorrect answers.  This number is your BOOM factor you must provide.

Upload completed work by 5:00 p.m. Wednesday 11/5.

This assignment is separate and independent from the exam score.

Questions on the exam will be taken after both submission and deadline.
